description: Collapse epic/issue/gate types into one node type 'task'. Relational primitive: blockers:[{id, on}] on the BLOCKED task, on in {claim,close}, enforced at that op's pre by a default gating plugin (core enforces nothing). epic = task with claim-blocking children; gate = child close-blocking parent; dep = cross-tree claim-blocker. Delivery/worktree plugin is kind-blind. CLI front-doors --parent/--gates/--needs are core (write core schema; plugins add no CLI). Gates are tasks-only. Revises §3 ball schema + supersedes the link taxonomy; refines bl-2a77/bl-03fd worktree plugin to kind-blind.
title: Topic: task taxonomy collapse — one node type + blocker model, gating plugin, kind-blind worktrees
